title: Sphingolipids Control Dermal Fibroblast Heterogeneity
author: Capolupo, Laura

description: Notebooks for analysis of single cell RNA sequencing datasets and CELLMA lipotype state transition inference modeling, to reproduce the results of the manuscript "Sphingolipids Control Dermal Fibroblast Heterogeneity."
